problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「Tom wrote this book.」
problems.correct_answer: This book was written by Tom.
problems.hint_1: 受け身の形は「be動詞＋過去分詞」です。
problems.hint_2: 過去の受け身：was/were＋過去分詞（＋by ...）
problems.explanation_base: This book was written by Tom.（受け身）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「She cleaned this room.」
problems.correct_answer: This room was cleaned by her.
problems.hint_1: 受け身の形は「be動詞＋過去分詞」です。
problems.hint_2: was + cleaned（規則活用）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This room was cleaned by her.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「They use English all over the world.」
problems.correct_answer: English is used all over the world.
problems.hint_1: 現在の受け身：is/are＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: is + used（規則活用）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: English is used all over the world.（現在の受け身）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「We speak Japanese in Japan.」
problems.correct_answer: Japanese is spoken in Japan.
problems.hint_1: 現在の受け身：is/are＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: is + spoken（speak の過去分詞）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: Japanese is spoken in Japan.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「She loves him.」
problems.correct_answer: He is loved by her.
problems.hint_1: 現在の受け身：is/are＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: is + loved（規則活用）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: He is loved by her.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の疑問文に書き換えなさい。
「This cake was made by Mary.」
problems.correct_answer: Was this cake made by Mary?
problems.hint_1: 受け身の疑問文は be動詞を先頭に置きます。
problems.hint_2: Was + 主語 + 過去分詞〜? の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: Was this cake made by Mary?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の否定文に書き換えなさい。
「This letter was written by him.」
problems.correct_answer: This letter was not written by him.
problems.hint_1: 受け身の否定文は be動詞の後に not を置きます。
problems.hint_2: was not + 過去分詞〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This letter was not written by him.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「He broke the window.」
problems.correct_answer: The window was broken by him.
problems.hint_1: break の過去分詞は broken です。
problems.hint_2: The window was + broken（break の過去分詞）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: The window was broken by him.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「People sell flowers here.」
problems.correct_answer: Flowers are sold here.
problems.hint_1: 現在の受け身で by ... を使わない場合もあります。
problems.hint_2: Flowers are + sold（sell の過去分詞）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: Flowers are sold here.（by peopleは省略可）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「He built this house three years ago.」
problems.correct_answer: This house was built three years ago.
problems.hint_1: build の過去分詞は built です。
problems.hint_2: This house was + built（by himは省略）の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This house was built three years ago.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この歌は多くの人たちに愛されています。」
problems.correct_answer: This song is loved by many people.
problems.hint_1: 現在の受け身：is/are＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: This song is loved by 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This song is loved by many people.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「このコンピューターは彼によって使われました。」
problems.correct_answer: This computer was used by him.
problems.hint_1: 過去の受け身：was/were＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: This computer was used by him の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This computer was used by him.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この橋はいつ作られましたか？」
problems.correct_answer: When was this bridge built?
problems.hint_1: 受け身の疑問文で疑問詞を先頭に置きます。
problems.hint_2: When was + 主語(this bridge) + 過去分詞(built)? の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: When was this bridge built?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この本は日本語で書かれていません。」
problems.correct_answer: This book is not written in Japanese.
problems.hint_1: 受け身の否定文：is/are not＋過去分詞
problems.hint_2: This book is not written in Japanese の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: This book is not written in Japanese.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この写真はあなたによって撮られましたか？」
problems.correct_answer: Was this picture taken by you?
problems.hint_1: 過去の受け身の疑問文：Was＋主語＋過去分詞＋by...?
problems.hint_2: Was this picture taken by you? の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: Was this picture taken by you?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「He painted this picture.」
problems.correct_answer: This picture was painted by him.
problems.explanation_base: This picture was painted by him.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「People admire her.」
problems.correct_answer: She is admired by people.
problems.explanation_base: She is admired by people.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この国では英語が話されています。」
problems.correct_answer: English is spoken in this country.
problems.explanation_base: English is spoken in this country.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の疑問文に書き換えなさい。
「The library was closed.」
problems.correct_answer: Was the library closed?
problems.explanation_base: Was the library closed?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この映画は多くの国々で見られています。」
problems.correct_answer: This movie is watched in many countries.
problems.explanation_base: This movie is watched in many countries.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「They invite us.」
problems.correct_answer: We are invited by them.
problems.explanation_base: We are invited by them.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「He fixed the car.」
problems.correct_answer: The car was fixed by him.
problems.explanation_base: The car was fixed by him.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の文に書き換えなさい。
「She teaches math.」
problems.correct_answer: Math is taught by her.
problems.explanation_base: Math is taught by her.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この歌は世界中で歌われています。」
problems.correct_answer: This song is sung all over the world.
problems.explanation_base: This song is sung all over the world.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の否定文に書き換えなさい。
「This window was broken.」
problems.correct_answer: This window was not broken.
problems.explanation_base: This window was not broken.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「その手紙は昨日彼女によって送られました。」
problems.correct_answer: The letter was sent by her yesterday.
problems.explanation_base: The letter was sent by her yesterday.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
受け身の疑問文に書き換えなさい。
「The museum was built in 1920.」
problems.correct_answer: Was the museum built in 1920?
problems.explanation_base: Was the museum built in 1920?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「その事故はテレビで報道されました。」
problems.correct_answer: The accident was reported on TV.
problems.explanation_base: The accident was reported on TV.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「この地域ではどんな言語が話されていますか？」
problems.correct_answer: What language is spoken in this area?
problems.explanation_base: What language is spoken in this area?

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「彼の作品は多くの美術館に展示されています。」
problems.correct_answer: His works are displayed in many museums.
problems.explanation_base: His works are displayed in many museums.
